title: CHILDREN'S MUSEUM - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S MUSEUM OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS CHILDREN'S MUSEUM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers learning experiences that include art exhibits, fine motor skills, gross motor skills, literacy, culinary skills, music, and summer camps. Guests can purchase daily general admission or become members. 110 SW 4th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm, Sunday 12pm-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, visit website for scholarships requirements FEES: -Daily rates: Adults $10, and ages 1-17 $15 -Members and ages 0-1: None -6 month family scholarship: $35 DOCUMENTS: Proof of public assistance programs are required for scholarships LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Camps Museums Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
